context.quote_text: “ And is this all ? ”
“ I expected at least that the pigs were got into the garden , and here is nothing but Lady Catherine and her daughter ! ”

“ it is not Lady Catherine . The old lady is Mrs. Jenkinson , who lives with them . The other is Miss De Bourgh . Only look at her . She is quite a little creature . Who would have thought she could be so thin and small ! ”
“ She is abominably rude to keep Charlotte out of doors in all this wind . Why does she not come in ? ”

quotes.quote_text: “ it is not Lady Catherine . The old lady is Mrs. Jenkinson , who lives with them . The other is Miss De Bourgh . Only look at her . She is quite a little creature . Who would have thought she could be so thin and small ! ”

context.quote_text: “ I expected at least that the pigs were got into the garden , and here is nothing but Lady Catherine and her daughter ! ”
“ La ! my dear , ”
“ She is abominably rude to keep Charlotte out of doors in all this wind . Why does she not come in ? ”
“ Oh , Charlotte says she hardly ever does . It is the greatest of favours when Miss De Bourgh comes in . ”

quotes.quote_text: “ Oh , Charlotte says she hardly ever does . It is the greatest of favours when Miss De Bourgh comes in . ”

context.quote_text: “ it is not Lady Catherine . The old lady is Mrs. Jenkinson , who lives with them . The other is Miss De Bourgh . Only look at her . She is quite a little creature . Who would have thought she could be so thin and small ! ”
“ She is abominably rude to keep Charlotte out of doors in all this wind . Why does she not come in ? ”
“ I like her appearance , ”
“ She looks sickly and cross . Yes , she will do for him very well . She will make him a very proper wife . ”
“ But , ”
“ you will of course wish to have your humble respects delivered to them , with your grateful thanks for their kindness to you while you have been here . ”
“ it seems but a day or two since we first came ! and yet how many things have happened ! ”
“ A great many indeed , ”

quotes.quote_text: “ it seems but a day or two since we first came ! and yet how many things have happened ! ”

context.quote_text: “ you will of course wish to have your humble respects delivered to them , with your grateful thanks for their kindness to you while you have been here . ”
“ Good gracious ! ”
“ A great many indeed , ”
“ We have dined nine times at Rosings , besides drinking tea there twice ! How much I shall have to tell ! ”

quotes.quote_text: “ We have dined nine times at Rosings , besides drinking tea there twice ! How much I shall have to tell ! ”

context.quote_text: “ it seems but a day or two since we first came ! and yet how many things have happened ! ”
“ A great many indeed , ”
“ And how much I shall have to conceal ! ”
“ How nicely we are crammed in ”
